zh.lifeSummary: 當Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna於1060年出生時，她的父親Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen25歲，母親Árpád-házi Adelheid21歲。她於大約1080年與Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1085年12月25日享年25歲，埋葬在波蘭沃吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna于1060年出生时，她的父亲Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen25岁，母亲Árpád-házi Adelheid21岁。她于大约1080年与Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1085年12月25日享年25岁，埋葬在波兰沃吉。

nameMeanings.name: Judita
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna was born in 1060, her father, Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen, was 25 and her mother, Árpád-házi Adelheid, was 21. She married Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I about 1080. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 25 December 1085, at the age of 25, and was buried in Płock, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna est née en 1060, son père, Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Árpád-házi Adelheid, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I environ 1080. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1085, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterrée à płockie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna 1060 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen 25 und ihre Mutter Árpád-házi Adelheid 21. Sie hat um 1080 Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Dezember 1085 im Alter von 25 Jahren und wurde in Woiwodschaft Płock, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna è nata il nel 1060, sua padre, Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Árpád-házi Adelheid, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I circa 1080. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 dicembre 1085, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolta a płockie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Judita Grojčská Přemyslovnaが1060年に生まれた時，父Vratislav (II.) von Böhmenは25歳，母Árpád-házi Adelheidは21歳であった。約1080年にWladyslaw Herman von Polen Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1085年12月25日に25歳で死去し，ポーランドプlオクイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna(이)가 1060년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Árpád-házi Adelheid(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1080년 Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1085년 12월 25일 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 pl옥키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna nasceu em 1060, seu pai, Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Árpád-házi Adelheid, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I aproximadamente 1080. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1085, com 25 anos, e foi sepultada em płockie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna родилась в 1060 г., её отцу по имени Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Árpád-házi Adelheid, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I около 1080 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 декабря 1085 г. в возрасте 25 лет и была похоронена в местности Плоцкое воеводство, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna nació en 1060, su papá, Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Árpád-házi Adelheid, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I aproximadamente 1080. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1085, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultada en płockie, Polonia.
